modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about Coyote Cash transactions on a specific date

full_description_text: 
I was trying to find out if there were any transactions at the Coyote Cash machine. It was on a certain date, but I can't remember which one exactly. I just need to know if anything happened there. It’s really important for me to get this information, so I hope someone can help me with it.
